notes: Blog Day 11 complete 2026-06-08: exporting-pets-from-singapore.md (Marcus Webb, 2400 words). AVS export licence process, health certificate options (Option A/B), FAVN titre test for Australia DAFF Group 3 (90-day wait), Changi cargo via SATS/DNATA, destination matrix (UK/EU/US/AU), full cost table. Sources: NParks AVS 2026, DAFF 2026, UK APHA 2026, CDC 2026, EU Reg 576/2013. Blog 417->418, pages 6296->6297. Next: Chunk 39 (Template D, Conversational Q&A, Tier B). Blog Day 12 next.

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
